{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220300572DFF269DDD48861AA81F"}"},"total":221},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7581471810178532158","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挑的清穿的看的，别的剧基本没看过就没读。挺好看的，不管穿男穿女都很自然，有几个穿男的写的很好，最后一个永琮的没前一个永琮写的好，剧情走的太多，全是叙事。后面想看作者写点发疯版的或者直接贴脸开大的清穿，就是谁也不鸟，把皇帝的忌惮猜疑直接点出来，（这是看沈眉庄那篇有感），当然金手指也备好，毒不死也打不过！再写一篇装神的，逆境翻盘。（自己发疯想想）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765201533,"group_id":"7476326435242642494","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人如果没有梦想，那跟无忧无虑的生活有啥区别","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7WdROOkR10WXCCmCKjo4m0DMOh7REhIABhakpjkG9AG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1e2b11ef60394b66a7e693a3b0d0efe6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705068&x-signature=EH59HEVptqoD%2BBcx1DZ0jRB3mCI%3D","user_id":"2963880101818888","user_name":"快穿局养老组"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2963880101818888","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1664163162,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7476326435242642494","book_info":{"abstract":"新作品出炉啦，希望大家多多喜欢，多多支持吧！这里有各种各样的世界，剧情会三观跟着五官走哒，有1V1也有1Vn。欢迎欢迎～
每个世界都有分卷，喜欢哪个就去看那个。
把每一个世界都当成一个新的故事，女主不会有固定人设。
可能大杀四方，也可能绿茶白莲花。
作者会尊重所在世界的维度，仙神世界自然会有术法，封建社会要尊重当时的社会情况，仙侠世界自然会练武，现代世界也要遵守法律。
人物的所有设定，也只是仅限于当前世界。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1aee5dcbf79e9a163d546d60e7e748ce","author":"花残望日","author_id":"","book_id":"7476326435242642494","book_name":"综影视之开局绑定热播剧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b8a888","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1015,"name":"女频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1015&name=女频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7476326640088269374","read_count":"74976","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2282531"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"1168","tags":"女频衍生,系统,穿越,同人,综影视,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1b2d09ae91de9933c8e9effc7f92f35c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779303657&x-signature=dzz6rCYjfZFoprJjoE%2BPCBAXZsQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"553761890906584","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"762"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220300572DFF269DDD48861AA81F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读44小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0, isten_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5641,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":18297},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1742867673,"author_reply_time":1742867687,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7576560995143058201","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"跳着看了好几个世界，我最喜欢的还是甄嬛传中女穿男的那几个，每个皇子都穿了一遍，一个不落的看完了，可惜太短了 每次都完结在高潮处，事业线完全可以写的详细些啊，如果这几个世界加上论坛体或者观影体的话会更好看，每个世界都是二十章左右完结，看的真不过瘾，女穿男这几个世界比穿女的世界好看多了，转变性别和妻妾圆房的时候也不矫情，还很享受美人环绕的感觉，化身端水大师，我最喜欢的还是弘景和弘历这两个世界，事业线写的相对完整一些，帝王的魅力和功绩写的恰到好处，把我迷的不要不要的，希望作者可以多写写性转搞事业的单元，也没必要非局限在甄嬛传和如懿传，我要去重温一遍弘景和弘历的这两个单元","text_exts":[{"e":20,"s":17,"text":"甄嬛传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%94%84%E5%AC%9B%E4%BC%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774119657861AA81F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227576560995143058201%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227476326435242642494%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%94%84%E5%AC%9B%E4%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":90,"s":87,"text":"论坛体","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%AE%BA%E5%9D%9B%E4%BD%93&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774119657861AA81F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227576560995143058201%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227476326435242642494%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%AE%BA%E5%9D%9B%E4%BD%93%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":95,"s":92,"text":"观影体","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%82%E5%BD%B1%E4%BD%93&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774119657861AA81F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227576560995143058201%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227476326435242642494%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%82%E5%BD%B1%E4%BD%93%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":266,"s":2
